name: Preliminary
description: Short title, commencement, interpretation of definitions, scope of application, and non-application of the Act

name: Personal Data Protection
description: Core data protection framework comprising the seven Personal Data Protection Principles (General, Notice and Choice, Disclosure, Security, Retention, Data Integrity, Access), consent requirements, sensitive personal data, registration of data controllers, processing requirements, and rights of data subjects

name: Exemption
description: Exemptions from the Act including exemptions for Federal and State Government, and exemptions granted by the Minister

name: Commissioner
description: Appointment, tenure, powers, duties and functions of the Personal Data Protection Commissioner, including power to issue codes of practice and conduct audits

name: Fund
description: Establishment and administration of the Personal Data Protection Fund, including sources of funding, application of funds, and financial reporting requirements

name: Advisory Committee
description: Establishment, composition, functions and procedures of the Personal Data Protection Advisory Committee

name: Appeal Tribunal
description: Establishment, composition, jurisdiction and procedures of the Personal Data Protection Appeal Tribunal for hearing appeals against decisions of the Commissioner

name: Inspection, Complaint and Investigation
description: Powers of inspection, procedures for lodging complaints, and investigation powers of the Commissioner and authorised officers

name: Enforcement
description: Appointment of enforcement officers, powers of search and seizure, powers of arrest, production orders, and related enforcement mechanisms

name: Miscellaneous
description: General offences and penalties, liability of body corporate, compounding of offences, protection of officers, service of notices, evidence, and general provisions. Includes s129 on cross-border data transfer mechanisms and s12B on mandatory data breach notification, both inserted by the Personal Data Protection (Amendment) Act 2024 (Act A1727)

name: Savings and Transitional
description: Savings provisions and transitional arrangements for existing data controllers and ongoing proceedings upon commencement of the Act
